nodes.name: check-console-log.js
nodes.summary: Stop-lifecycle hook that scans git-modified JS/TS files for leftover console.log statements and emits non-blocking warnings; excludes tests, configs, and scripts/. Observes only (exit 0, pass-through).
nodes.languageNotes: Reads raw stdin with a 1MB cap and always passes the original payload through on exit.

nodes.name: passThroughAndExit
nodes.summary: Re-emits the captured stdin payload and exits 0, the pass-through path used after warnings are printed to stderr.

nodes.name: check-hook-enabled.js
nodes.summary: Tiny CLI helper that prints 'yes'/'no' depending on whether a given hook id is enabled under the active ECC hook profiles, used to gate hook execution from settings.

nodes.name: config-protection.js
nodes.summary: PreToolUse Edit/Write gate that BLOCKS (exit 2) modifications to existing linter/formatter config files (ESLint, Prettier, Biome, Ruff, etc.), steering the agent to fix source instead of relaxing checks. Allows first-time creation.

nodes.name: parseInput
nodes.summary: Parses the hook's stdin payload, accepting either a raw JSON string or a pre-parsed object.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Core gate logic: resolves the edited file basename against the protected-config set and emits a block decision (exit 2) when an existing protected config is being modified.

nodes.name: cost-tracker.js
nodes.summary: Stop-lifecycle telemetry hook that sums token usage across the session transcript JSONL and appends a cumulative cost row to ~/.claude/metrics/costs.jsonl, preferring an authoritative harness-cost cache when fresh. Observes only.
nodes.languageNotes: Documents a real-world bug fix: switched from absent Stop-payload usage fields to summing the transcript file Claude Code passes.

nodes.name: readHarnessCost
nodes.summary: Reads the per-session harness-cost cache file from the temp dir and returns the authoritative cost only when the cache is fresh within the max-age window.

nodes.name: sumUsageFromTranscript
nodes.summary: Parses the session transcript JSONL line by line and accumulates input/output and cache token counts across all assistant turns.

nodes.name: cursor-session-env.js
nodes.summary: Cursor SessionStart hook that resolves and injects ECC_AGENT_DATA_HOME into the composer session env so memory, learned skills, and metrics persist under a dedicated data root. Observes only.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Reads stdin, builds the Cursor session-env payload with the resolved agent data home, and writes it to stdout with explanatory additional_context.

nodes.name: design-quality-check.js
nodes.summary: PostToolUse Edit/Write hook that scans edited frontend files (astro/css/html/jsx/scss/svelte/tsx/vue) for generic-template drift heuristics and emits a non-blocking design-quality reminder. Self-contained, no network. Observes only.

nodes.name: getFilePaths
nodes.summary: Extracts edited file paths from the tool input, handling both single file_path and MultiEdit edits arrays.

nodes.name: buildWarning
nodes.summary: Composes the multi-line design-quality reminder message listing the touched frontend files, the design checklist, and detected generic signals.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Core hook logic: filters edited paths to frontend extensions, reads their content, detects generic-template signals, and emits the warning when frontend files were modified.

nodes.name: desktop-notify.js
nodes.summary: Stop-lifecycle hook that sends a native desktop notification with the task summary when Claude finishes: macOS via iTerm2 escape sequence or osascript, WSL via PowerShell BurntToast. Observes only.
nodes.languageNotes: Cross-platform notification with multiplexer (tmux/screen) detection and per-OS delivery fallbacks.

nodes.name: findPowerShell
nodes.summary: Locates an available PowerShell binary (pwsh or Windows PowerShell) under WSL for delivering toast notifications.

nodes.name: notifyWindows
nodes.summary: Sends a Windows toast notification via PowerShell BurntToast, escaping the title and body for the PowerShell command.

nodes.name: extractSummary
nodes.summary: Derives a short notification summary line from the assistant message, taking the first meaningful line and truncating it.

nodes.name: findTerminalTTY
nodes.summary: Walks up the process tree via ps to locate the controlling terminal TTY, used to route iTerm2 notifications to the right tab.

nodes.name: notifyMacOS
nodes.summary: Delivers a macOS notification, preferring the iTerm2 native escape sequence written to the terminal TTY and falling back to osascript.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Core hook logic: parses stdin, extracts the summary, and dispatches the platform-appropriate notification (macOS or WSL/Windows).

nodes.name: ecc-context-monitor.js
nodes.summary: PostToolUse context-monitor hook that reads the metrics bridge file and injects agent-facing warnings when thresholds cross: context exhaustion, high cost, scope creep, or tool loops. Observes/warns only.

nodes.name: writeWarnState
nodes.summary: Atomically writes the per-session warn-state file via a temp file and rename-with-retry to avoid partial writes.

nodes.name: detectLoop
nodes.summary: Inspects the recent tool-call signature counts to detect repeated identical tool invocations indicating a stuck loop.

nodes.name: evaluateConditions
nodes.summary: Evaluates the bridge metrics against context/cost/scope/loop thresholds and returns a severity-sorted list of warnings.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Core hook logic: reads the bridge, evaluates threshold conditions, de-duplicates against prior warn-state, and injects the top warnings into the agent context.

nodes.name: ecc-metrics-bridge.js
nodes.summary: PostToolUse telemetry hook that maintains a running per-session metrics aggregate in a temp bridge file (cost, files touched, recent tool hashes), avoiding repeated JSONL scans. Read by the statusline and context monitor. Observes only.

nodes.name: stableStringify
nodes.summary: Produces a deterministic, key-sorted string representation of a value for stable hashing of tool inputs.

nodes.name: hashToolCall
nodes.summary: Computes a stable SHA-256 signature for a tool invocation (special-casing edit/write payloads) used for loop detection and dedupe.

nodes.name: extractFilePaths
nodes.summary: Pulls touched file paths from a Write/Edit/MultiEdit tool input for tracking files modified during the session.

nodes.name: writeCostWarningIfChanged
nodes.summary: Emits a cost warning to stderr only when its signature differs from the cached one, preventing duplicate per-turn warnings.

nodes.name: readSessionCost
nodes.summary: Reads and sums session cost/token usage from the costs JSONL, warning when the file is missing or contains malformed lines.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Core hook logic: updates the per-session bridge aggregate with touched files, recent tool hashes, and refreshed cost, writing it atomically.

nodes.name: ecc-statusline.js
nodes.summary: statusLine command (not a hook event) that renders model, current task, cost/token counts, directory, and a context-usage bar by reading the metrics bridge file plus Claude Code runtime stdin. Observes only.
nodes.languageNotes: Registered under settings.json statusLine rather than hooks.json; uses Unicode block characters to draw the context bar.

nodes.name: formatDuration
nodes.summary: Formats the elapsed time since an ISO timestamp into a compact human string like '5s', '12m', or '1h23m'.

nodes.name: buildContextBar
nodes.summary: Builds the Unicode progress bar and percentage string representing remaining context window.

nodes.name: readCurrentTask
nodes.summary: Finds the most recent agent todo file for the session and returns the active in-progress task label for display.

nodes.name: runStatusline
nodes.summary: Core statusline logic: reads runtime stdin and the metrics bridge, assembles the model/task/cost/dir/context segments, and writes the rendered line to stdout.

nodes.name: evaluate-session.js
nodes.summary: Stop-lifecycle continuous-learning hook that reads the session transcript and extracts reusable patterns into the learned-skills directory. Chosen on Stop (once per session) over UserPromptSubmit for lower latency. Observes only.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that parses the Stop payload, resolves the learned-skills config and directory, and counts/extracts patterns from the session before exiting 0.

nodes.name: governance-capture.js
nodes.summary: PreToolUse/PostToolUse security hook that detects governance-relevant events (hardcoded secrets, policy violations, security findings, approval-required ops) and writes them to the governance events store. Gated by ECC_GOVERNANCE_CAPTURE. Observes/records only.

nodes.name: detectSecrets
nodes.summary: Scans text against secret patterns (AWS keys, generic secrets, private keys, JWTs) and returns the matched finding names.

nodes.name: detectApprovalRequired
nodes.summary: Matches a command against approval-required patterns and returns the findings that should trigger an approval-requested event.

nodes.name: summarizeCommand
nodes.summary: Produces a truncated, fingerprinted summary of a command for safe logging in governance events without leaking full payloads.

nodes.name: analyzeForGovernanceEvents
nodes.summary: Inspects a tool invocation for secrets, sensitive paths, approval-required operations, and security-relevant commands, building the list of governance events to emit.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Core hook logic: gated by ECC_GOVERNANCE_CAPTURE, parses input, runs analysis on PreToolUse, and emits the resulting governance events.
